page: Hetzner Cloud cx43 is an x86_64 virtual server powered by the QEMU hypervisor and AMD EPYC processors running at 2.0 GHz. It features 8 shared vCPUs with a single thread per core and a 16 MB L3 cache. The hardware configuration includes 16.0 GB of system memory, providing approximately 1.95 GB of RAM per core, and is bundled with 160 GB of local SSD storage. No GPU resources are included in this instance type.

In benchmark evaluations, the cx43 demonstrates strong single-core CPU performance in stress-ng tests, placing in the top 25 percent. However, its multi-core CPU performance and Geekbench scores fall within the average range. Memory bandwidth is also moderate, with read-only large block speeds at 89.3 GB/sec and write speeds at 62.62 GB/sec. Single-threaded gzip compression represents a relative bottleneck, scoring in the bottom 25 percent, while bzip3 decompression and Redis SET operations perform at average tier levels.

Given its shared CPU allocation, the cx43 offers a resource-dense profile suitable for budget-conscious deployments that do not require dedicated CPU threads. The 1:2 vCPU-to-RAM ratio makes it a viable option for compute-focused workloads with moderate memory requirements. Recommended workloads include static web serving, software compilation, database operations, and lightweight text or image processing tasks where occasional CPU sharing does not impact baseline operations.
description: Hetzner Cloud cx43 is an x86_64 virtual server configured with 8 shared AMD EPYC vCPUs running at 2.0 GHz, 16.0 GB of RAM, and 160 GB of local SSD storage. Operating under the QEMU hypervisor, this instance delivers strong single-core CPU performance in stress-ng benchmarks, while its multi-core capabilities, memory bandwidth, and database operations align with average tier standards. The 1:2 vCPU-to-RAM ratio provides a balanced compute-focused environment without dedicated CPU guarantees. This makes the cx43 a cost-efficient option for workloads such as static web serving, software compilation, and moderate database operations where shared CPU resources are acceptable.
og_description: Hetzner Cloud cx43 is an x86_64 virtual server featuring 8 shared AMD EPYC vCPUs, 16 GB of RAM, and 160 GB of SSD storage, delivering strong single-core and average multi-core performance.
meta_description: Hetzner Cloud cx43 features 8 shared AMD EPYC vCPUs, 16 GB RAM, and 160 GB SSD storage, offering balanced performance for general compute workloads.
tagline: An efficient shared-CPU virtual server featuring AMD EPYC processors and local SSD storage for balanced, budget-conscious compute workloads.

16.0 GB of system memory and 160 GB of local SSD storage
